name: nlpm
description: Natural-Language Programming checker-backed Codex workflows plus reference knowledge — deterministic nlpm-check skills, the 50 Rules, the 100-point scoring rubric, per-tool conventions, anti-patterns, vocabulary discipline, and authoring guides. Claude Code remains the richer slash-command orchestration surface.

interface.shortDescription: Checker-backed Codex workflows plus NLPM rules, scoring rubric, per-tool conventions, and authoring guides.
interface.longDescription: nlpm's Codex CLI package includes checker-backed workflow skills for deterministic validation with bin/nlpm-check, plus reference skills for the 50 Rules of Natural Language Programming, the 100-point scoring rubric, per-tool conventions for Claude Code / Codex CLI / Antigravity, anti-patterns, the R51 vocabulary discipline framework, and authoring guides for skills, agents, hooks, rules, plugins, and prompts. The Codex skills call the standalone checker and interpret structured findings; the interactive /nlpm:* slash commands that orchestrate sub-agents remain the Claude Code plugin surface.
defaultPrompt: Check this repo with nlpm-check and explain the findings.
